PhD Student @ Renmin University of China

Gu Yukai

I am a PhD student at the Gaoling School of Artificial Intelligence, Renmin University of China. My recent work is around multimodal models, evaluation, inference-time optimization, and research tooling.

Before RUC, I studied computer science at Beijing Jiaotong University and worked on multimodal hallucination evaluation, deep video compression, and open-source productivity tools.

    Why this site stays close to plain HTML

    A research notebook does not have to become an application before it becomes useful.
